title: Hungary has defended Europe against civilisational erasure
summary_full: Hungary has always seen itself as the shield of Europe, the frontier defender against foreign threats. On Sunday, Hungarian voters proved worthy of that tradition
summary_public: Hungary has always seen itself as the shield of Europe, the frontier defender against foreign threats. On Sunday, Hungarian voters proved worthy of that tradition

HU.label: positive
